user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new break with an allowable duration and applicability, so that employee break time is governed by policy
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Break screen; When I click Add new break and provide a name, allowable duration in minutes and applicability; Then the break is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view configured breaks with their allowable duration and applicability, so that I can review break policies
acceptance_criteria: Given breaks exist; When I open the Break screen; Then each break is listed with its name, allowable duration (mins) and applicability

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit or view an existing break, so that I can keep break durations and applicability accurate
acceptance_criteria: Given a break is listed; When I click View or Edit and update the details; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the break list, so that I always see the latest break configurations
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Break screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
